enchantment_lore.keepinv:safekeep.descri:
Compatible with: Armor

Keep all items on death at the cost of 33% item durability
enchantment_lore.keepinv:deathlock.descr:
Compatible with: Chestplates

Items lost/Graves created on death can only be obtained by one self
enchantment_lore.keepinv:gravehold.descr:
Compatible with: Chestplates

Items/Graves dropped on death will stay there for double the time before they disappear
wiki.keepinv.safekeep:
Keep all items on death at the cost of 33% item durability 

• §lMax Level§r: I

• §lApplicable to§r: Armor

• §lIncompabilities§r: Deathlock, Gravehold, Mending, Sacrifice, Handyman

• §lLoot Sources§r: Enchanting Table, Random Loot, Traded Books, Treasure
wiki.keepinv.deathlock:
Items lost/Graves created on death can only be obtained by one self 

• §lMax Level§r: I

• §lApplicable to§r: Chestplates

• §lIncompabilities§r: Safekeep, Gravehold

• §lLoot Sources§r: Enchanting Table, Random Loot, Traded Books, Treasure
wiki.keepinv.gravehold:
Items/Graves dropped on death will stay there for double the time before they disappear 

• §lMax Level§r: I

• §lApplicable to§r: Chestplates

• §lIncompabilities§r: Safekeep, Deathlock

• §lLoot Sources§r: Enchanting Table, Random Loot, Traded Books, Treasure
text.keepinv.no_saved_inventory: Nenhum inventário salvo por este jogador.
menu.keepinv.title: Inventário Nice Keep: Configurações
menu.keepinv.config.main.title: Inventário Nice Keep: Menu Admin
menu.keepinv.restore.description: Prossegue reiniciará todos os valores configurados. Você deseja continuar?
menu.keepinv.restore.title: Restaurar Valores Padrão
menu.keepinv.config.restore_inv.title: Restaurar Inventário do Jogador
menu.keepinv.config.restore_inv.desc:
Recupera o inventário que um jogador tinha antes de morrer por último.
Os itens sempre surgirão/serão posicionados na sua posição atual 

O Jogador precisa estar online!
menu.keepinv.uninstall.description: Proceeding removes all needed entries. Certain Progress will be lost forever. Don't forget to delete the Nice Keep Inventory file afterwards.
menu.keepinv.uninstall.description_2: Keep in mind that already existing Items, Entities, generated Loot and Structures can't be removed automatically.
option.keepinv.non_droppable_tag_list: Lista de Marcação de itens não-largáveis
